uboot-http.description: U-Boot HTTP recovery (hold reset button, power on). GL.iNet U-Boot is shared across the Filogic line; mirrors glinet-mt3000 — LED timing and reset location NOT yet pcap-verified on MT6000.
uboot-http.reset_instructions: Press and hold the reset button on the side of the device, then plug in power. Hold until the LED signals recovery mode.
uboot-http.led_pattern: unverified — assume blue LED flashes then solid (per MT3000); confirm via pcap before relying on it

sysupgrade.description: SSH sysupgrade from existing OpenWrt, or GL.iNet web UI (More Settings → Advanced → Upload Firmware, untick Keep settings)
